narrative:
18 Ohio House district has 92,221 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 45.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 41.6 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +16.6% D−R vs +56.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
